queries.intent: Find SaaS and dashboard references that look premium without sacrificing clarity.
Find landing pages with strong motion discipline that still protect comprehension and accessibility.
Find studio and portfolio sites where case studies explain design decisions instead of only showing visuals.
Find editorial and brand sites with strong typography, pacing, and restrained interaction systems.
Find how strong sites place demos, proof, and CTAs without turning the page into generic SaaS clutter.
